title: ligularia lankongensis
intro: Ligularia lankongensis, also known as the Lankong ligularia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Ligularia lankongensis is often used in combination with other plants, such as ginseng and licorice root, and can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
